description: India Book (IB) II, 53. Letter of thanks from Ḥalfon ha-Levi b. Menashshe to Khalaf b. Yiṣḥaq. Fustat. Dating: ca. 1120s or, more broadly, ca. 1100-1138 CE based on the years when Ḥalfon was active.
tags: India, ib-untranslated-eng, IB2, ib-partial translation-heb, thanks
description_he: מכתב בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic מהמאה ה-12 מפוסטאט. מוחזק בבודליאן אוקספורד.
